title: ceratostylis retisquama
intro: Ceratostylis retisquama, also known as the netted orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the nervous system and improve circulation. The health benefits of Ceratostylis retisquama include its potential to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a decoction or infused in water for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
